title: cyclosorus micans
intro: Cyclosorus micans, also known as the Microsorum or Chinese microsorum, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus micans include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as improved digestion and immune system function. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make infusions and poultices.
